CustomField.formula:
tc9_bgl__Entity__r.Name & IF( NOT(ISBLANK(tc9_bgl__Department__r.Name)), "-" & LEFT(tc9_bgl__Department__r.Name, FIND("-", tc9_bgl__Department__r.Name & "-") - 1), "" ) &
IF( NOT(ISBLANK(tc9_bgl__Natural_Account__r.Name)), "-" & tc9_bgl__Natural_Account__r.Name, "" )
CustomField.label: Account
